description:
You are a wholesale sales representative preparing to announce a new industrial equipment product line to distribution partners. Create a new email marketing campaign in SuiteCRM with the following details:

- Campaign Name: Q3 Industrial Equipment Launch
- Campaign Type: Email
- Description: Email campaign announcing new industrial equipment product line to wholesale distribution partners for Q3 2025
- Start Date: 07/01/2025
- End Date: 09/30/2025
- Budget: 15000
- Status: Planning

Associate the existing target list 'Q3 Industrial Partners' with this campaign.
